name: Iso11783OPSetLabel
title: Iso11783OPSetLabel
syntax: long Iso11783OPSetLabel( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword stringVarIdD, dword fontType, dword graphID );
description: A Set Label command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
